connectors.name: Reset
connectors.description: Connect via a 4K7 resistor to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit. This pin must be connected via the 4K7 resistor or the PICAXE will not operate correctly. This pin can also be connected to a switch to 0V (ground) to provide a manual 'reset button' for the PICAXE

connectors.name: Serial In
connectors.description: Connect to the 22K resistor of the PICAXE download circuit

connectors.name: Serial Out
connectors.description: Connect to the output pin of the download connector for the PICAXE download circuit

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: Resonator
connectors.description: Connect to a resonator or crystal which must be included to make the PICAXE operate
